## Meeting Purpose

[Review content outline and discuss new project assignment with updated content creation process.](https://fathom.video/share/gs6AgytxWYKyCatmYU1fH-e-Yn9QjAx8?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New project requires zero-fluff, highly specific content for a legal company dealing with DUI cases](https://fathom.video/share/gs6AgytxWYKyCatmYU1fH-e-Yn9QjAx8?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Updated outline process: create custom outlines based on top websites, not AI-generated ones](https://fathom.video/share/gs6AgytxWYKyCatmYU1fH-e-Yn9QjAx8?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [Content boxes in outlines should be limited to 500-600 words to avoid fluff](https://fathom.video/share/gs6AgytxWYKyCatmYU1fH-e-Yn9QjAx8?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Writer to start on 10 new topic outlines immediately, with content writing to follow after tomorrow's call](https://fathom.video/share/gs6AgytxWYKyCatmYU1fH-e-Yn9QjAx8?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

## Topics

### Content Outline Review

  - [Discussed potential redundancy in current outline sections (e.g., "key metrics" vs "event goals")](https://fathom.video/share/gs6AgytxWYKyCatmYU1fH-e-Yn9QjAx8?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Suggested consolidating similar topics and removing repetitive content](https://fathom.video/share/gs6AgytxWYKyCatmYU1fH-e-Yn9QjAx8?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Proposed reorganizing metrics into hard and soft categories for clarity](https://fathom.video/share/gs6AgytxWYKyCatmYU1fH-e-Yn9QjAx8?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)

### New Project Requirements

  - [Client: Legal company focusing on DUI (Driving Under Influence) products/services](https://fathom.video/share/gs6AgytxWYKyCatmYU1fH-e-Yn9QjAx8?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Content must be:](https://fathom.video/share/gs6AgytxWYKyCatmYU1fH-e-Yn9QjAx8?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
      - [Extremely factual with zero fluff](https://fathom.video/share/gs6AgytxWYKyCatmYU1fH-e-Yn9QjAx8?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
      - [Backed by surveys or concrete data](https://fathom.video/share/gs6AgytxWYKyCatmYU1fH-e-Yn9QjAx8?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
      - [Designed for scanners (80% of readers), using extensive bullet points and subpoints](https://fathom.video/share/gs6AgytxWYKyCatmYU1fH-e-Yn9QjAx8?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [Direct and crisp, avoiding any repetition](https://fathom.video/share/gs6AgytxWYKyCatmYU1fH-e-Yn9QjAx8?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)

### Updated Content Creation Process

  - [Writer to create custom outlines based on top 5-10 websites, not AI-generated ones](https://fathom.video/share/gs6AgytxWYKyCatmYU1fH-e-Yn9QjAx8?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Outlines to be pasted into a new section for review](https://fathom.video/share/gs6AgytxWYKyCatmYU1fH-e-Yn9QjAx8?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Content boxes in outlines limited to 500-600 words to prevent fluff](https://fathom.video/share/gs6AgytxWYKyCatmYU1fH-e-Yn9QjAx8?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Specific instructions for AI to be included with article outline generation](https://fathom.video/share/gs6AgytxWYKyCatmYU1fH-e-Yn9QjAx8?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Process requires extra time (30-60 minutes) but will be compensated accordingly](https://fathom.video/share/gs6AgytxWYKyCatmYU1fH-e-Yn9QjAx8?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)

### Project Timeline and Availability

  - [Writer available from 3 PM PKT onwards](https://fathom.video/share/gs6AgytxWYKyCatmYU1fH-e-Yn9QjAx8?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [10 topic outlines to be started immediately](https://fathom.video/share/gs6AgytxWYKyCatmYU1fH-e-Yn9QjAx8?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Detailed project brief and client feedback to be provided in upcoming call (either today or tomorrow at 3 PM PKT)](https://fathom.video/share/gs6AgytxWYKyCatmYU1fH-e-Yn9QjAx8?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Content writing to commence after the briefing call](https://fathom.video/share/gs6AgytxWYKyCatmYU1fH-e-Yn9QjAx8?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

  - [Writer to begin creating outlines for 10 new topics immediately](https://fathom.video/share/gs6AgytxWYKyCatmYU1fH-e-Yn9QjAx8?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
